name: ProfM Google Ads Project
description: Active Google Ads account for ProfM fulfillment company — audit complete March 2026, Phase 1 fixes pending
type: project
---

**Account ID:** 4934487005
**Full audit document:** `/Users/nikolaj/My vibecode aplications/google-ads/profm-audit-march-2026.md`
**Audit date:** 2026-03-21

- **Business:** ProfM — fulfillment services + warehouse storage
- **New service:** Pallet storage (320 pallet rack system on order)
- **YouTube:** https://youtube.com/@mtpgroup
- **Geography:** All of Ukraine

- **Budget:** 20,000₴/month starting budget, unlimited if generating clients
- **Target client:** All business sizes, priority = large anchor clients (1–2 large >> many small)

1. **Broken conversion tracking** — 13 of 14 conversion actions must be disabled from metric; keep only ID 6497597908 "Отправка формы (Заявка_укр_версія)" with ONE_PER_CLICK
2. **Dead warehouse campaigns** — bids at 12₴ vs first-page CPC 24–35₴ → raise to 28–36₴
3. **Informational query waste** — ~424₴/month wasted on "what is fulfillment" queries → add negative keywords
4. **Garbage broad-match keywords** — 20+ single-word QS=0 keywords → pause them
summary: Critical Issues Found (Phase 1 — pending manual fix by user)

content: All write ops require manual UI changes — MCP server is read-only.
summary: Phase 1 Actions (user must do manually in UI)

content: Comprehensive audit done 2026-03-21. Phase 1 fixes critical before spending 20k₴/month budget.
When continuing this project, check if Phase 1 has been completed before recommending Phase 2 actions. Ask user: "Чи виправили конверсійний трекінг та мінус-слова?"

name: ProfM Vercel Migration
description: Migration of fulfillmentmtp.com.ua from Tilda to Vercel — completed tasks, remaining setup, project structure
type: project
---

**Project path:** `/Users/nikolaj/My vibecode aplications/profm-site/`
**Live URL:** https://profm-site.vercel.app
**Original:** https://fulfillmentmtp.com.ua (still on Tilda)

1. **Blog** — 35 blog posts scraped from Tilda, created as static HTML pages at `/ua/blog/tpost/{slug}/index.html`. Blog listing page rebuilt with static cards.
2. **Fonts** — Downloaded from `fonts.tildacdn.com` (FuturaPT family), saved as base64 CSS at `/css/fonts.css`. Font loader JS rewritten to load locally.
3. **CDN removal** — All `tildacdn.com/one` references replaced with local paths across all HTML files. Downloaded 7 additional JS files + 1 CSS file.
4. **Links** — All hardcoded `fulf

- **Forms:** Set env vars in Vercel: `TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN` + `TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID` or `WEB3FORMS_KEY` for form notifications
- **Deploy:** Run `vercel --prod` or push to git
- **DNS:** Point fulfillmentmtp.com.ua to Vercel when ready
- **Canonical URLs:** Update to final production domain when DNS is switched
Tilda export had CDN dependencies, broken forms, and dynamic blog feed that doesn't work outside Tilda. Full static conversion needed for Vercel hosting.
When continuing this project, check if forms are configured (env vars set) and if the site has been deployed to production.

name: User Profile
description: User background — Ukrainian-speaking business owner managing Google Ads for fulfillment company
type: user
---

- **Language:** Ukrainian (communicates primarily in Ukrainian)
- **Role:** Business owner / decision maker (ProfM fulfillment company)
- **Google Ads experience:** Intermediate — understands campaigns, not deeply technical on API/GAQL
- **Approach preference:** Practical, action-oriented — wants specific steps, not just theory
- **Budget mindset:** ROI-driven — "unlimited budget if it brings clients"
- **Auto-deploy workflow**: After every code edit, automatically commit, and push to GitHub. No need to ask — just do it.

- Stack: FastAPI backend (Heroku/Railway), React+Vite frontend (Vercel), Python agents
- Key files: `agents/research_agent.py`, `agents/orchestrator.py`, `backend/main.py`
- Deploy: auto-deploy from GitHub push to main

name: User profile
description: Nikolaj manages ProfM Google Ads account, strongly prefers automated API approach over manual UI work
type: user
---

User manages Google Ads for ProfM fulfillment company (account 4934487005).
Prefers that Claude handles all changes through API rather than doing anything manually in the Google Ads UI.
Communicates in Ukrainian.

- Deploy via `npx vercel --prod` after every update
- Production URL: https://mtp-cabinet.vercel.app
- Minor TS warnings in api/proxy.ts and api/proxy2.ts about @vercel/node types (non-blocking)

- React 19 + TypeScript + Vite + TailwindCSS 4
- State: Zustand (auth), TanStack React Query (data)
- 1C API sync through Express proxy → fulfillment.in.ua:34443
- Filters use `useFilterState` hook with URL search params sync
- Refresh/sync button: `ApiStatusBar` component (consistent across Products, Orders, Stock pages)

- Pages use mock data fallback when API unavailable
- Commit style: conventional commits (feat:, fix:, refactor:, debug:)
- Ukrainian language UI
- [project_photoforge.md](project_photoforge.md) — PhotoForge SaaS: stack, design tokens, current build status, next steps

name: PhotoForge project context
description: SaaS for AI product photo generation — stack, design tokens, current status
type: project
---

PhotoForge is a Next.js 16 SaaS for e-commerce AI product photography (Ukrainian market).

**Stack:** Next.js 16.2.0 App Router + React 19 + TypeScript 5.9, Tailwind CSS v4, Supabase (auth + Postgres + Storage), Stripe (one-time + subscriptions), Google Gemini AI (2.5 Flash for prompts, 2.5 Flash Preview for images), Vertex AI fallback, Google Drive/Sheets

name: Daughters Fund app overview
description: What the app is, its tech stack, and which features exist
type: project
---

Vite + React SPA — a DCA investment calculator for a children's fund. All logic is in `src/App.jsx`; styles split between `src/index.css` (global reset) and `src/App.css` (all component styles). Deployed on Railway.

**Why:** Personal tool to plan long-term savings for the author's daughters, simulating ОВДП (UAH bonds), EUR/USD bonds, and BTC/ETH/SOL crypto.
